character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Addressed the crew, ordered them ashore, and arranged for the party to be split. Noted as the leader but Silver took over the arrangement.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Arranged the party after the captain left, and was the actual captain of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Taken into confidence and received the news with less surprise than expected.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Taken into confidence and received the news with less surprise than expected.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Taken into confidence and received the news with less surprise than expected.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Slipped into the boat, evaded Silver's pursuit, and explored the island.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Referred to as 'Long John' in the context of the crew's mutiny.
